title: Forge Performance Benchmarks
description: Rolling window of performance metrics per pipeline run. Stored at .forge/benchmarks.json. Survives /forge-recover reset.

runs.description: Per-run metric entries, ordered chronologically. Trimmed to rolling_window * 2.

rolling_average.description: Computed average over the most recent rolling_window runs.

run_id.description: Story ID or timestamp-based identifier for the pipeline run.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when metrics were recorded.

branch.description: Git branch name for the run.

build_time_ms.description: Build command wall-clock time in milliseconds.

lint_time_ms.description: Lint command wall-clock time in milliseconds.

test_duration_ms.description: Test suite wall-clock time in milliseconds.

bundle_size_bytes.description: Total frontend bundle size in bytes.

artifact_sizes.description: Individual artifact file sizes in bytes. Keys are relative file paths.

custom.description: Custom metric values extracted via user-defined regex patterns.

window_size.description: Number of recent runs used to compute the average.

build_time_ms.description: Average build time across the window.

lint_time_ms.description: Average lint time across the window.

test_duration_ms.description: Average test duration across the window.

test_count.description: Average test count across the window.

bundle_size_bytes.description: Average bundle size across the window.
